title: Niva Bupa is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Niva Bupa is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!
